summary: Full testing of Variant Completion Tracker feature completed. All 11 backend API tests pass (100%), all frontend UI tests pass. The completion endpoint correctly returns variant data with proper grouping, and the VariantCompletion component renders correctly on vinyl variant pages.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: GET /api/vinyl/completion/30984958 (Charli XCX Brat) returns completion data with album='Brat', artist='Charli XCX', master_id=3505440, total_variants=30, owned_count=0, completion_pct=0
PASS: Each variant in array has name (string), owned (boolean), and release_ids (array of integers)
PASS: Variants properly grouped - 'Black Translucent' groups 2 regional pressings [32032082, 30984958], 'Standard Black Vinyl' groups multiple pressings
PASS: GET /api/vinyl/completion/31785674 (Chappell Roan) returns valid data with 3 variants: Baby Pink, Pink (3 pressings), Pink [Baby Pink]
PASS: GET /api/vinyl/completion/99999999 handles nonexistent release gracefully with {error: 'Release not found', variants: [], completion: 0}
PASS: Frontend /vinyl/charli-xcx/brat/black-translucent shows VariantCompletion card (data-testid='variant-completion-card') with progress bar, '0 / 30 variants', '0% complete'
PASS: Variant rows display empty checkbox for missing variants (data-testid='variant-row-*' selectors working)
PASS: 'Show All 30 Variants' toggle button (data-testid='completion-toggle') expands to show all 30 variant rows
PASS: Frontend /vinyl/chappell-roan/pink-pony-club/baby-pink shows completion card with 3 variants, no toggle button (correctly hidden for <= 6 variants)
PASS: Completion percentage (data-testid='completion-pct') displays correctly as '0% complete'
test_credentials: No auth required - completion endpoint returns owned=false for all variants without authentication
context_for_next_testing_agent: Variant Completion Tracker feature fully tested. Backend endpoint /api/vinyl/completion/{discogs_id} returns variant completion data with proper grouping by normalized variant name. The endpoint uses Discogs master release versions (cached in 'master_versions' collection) and individual release color data (cached in 'discogs_releases' collection). Frontend VariantCompletion.js component renders correctly with data-testid attributes for testing. Test records: Charli XCX Brat [30984958] = 30 variants, Chappell Roan Pink Pony Club [31785674] = 3 variants. Component shows progress bar, completion count, variant rows with checkboxes, and expand/collapse toggle for > 6 variants.

verified: 30 unique variant groups from Discogs master versions
release_ids are integer discogs release IDs
